Interface ISQLSyntax3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply information about SQL functionality.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A88CF38A-1576-4253-9873-9DC0A2196C25")]
public interface ISQLSyntax3 : ISQLSyntax2, ISQLSyntax
